content: Backend: create cashier_router with POS orders, payments, shifts endpoints + DB collections
Backend: seed menu items (POS products with price) + demo cashier user
Frontend: create CashierLayout (topbar + nav POS/Payment/Shift + outlet selector)
Frontend: POS page (menu grid + cart + checkout)
Frontend: Payment/Orders page (list orders, pay, void)
Frontend: Shift page (open/close shift + summary + variance)
Activate Cashier portal in PortalSelector and routing in App.js
Run comprehensive backend + frontend tests via testing agent
